description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume is for men who are optimistic and have faith. Product Details Rasasi Hope is a perfume spray for men with a fresh aromatic, floral marine and woody fragrance. The perfume comes in transparent bottle with clear and simple lines and a silver cap Size 75 ml
